name: acgl-payment-order
description: Plain HTML/CSS/JS Payment Order Request (no backend).

scripts.build:wp:local: node generate-page-bundles.js && node build-wp-plugin.js && node restore-wp-generated.js
scripts.package:wp:local: node package-wp-plugin.js --slug acgl-fms-wp --out acgl-fms-wp.zip && node restore-wp-generated.js
scripts.package:all:local: node package-wp-plugin.js --slug acgl-fms-wp --out acgl-fms-wp.zip && node package-wp-plugin-demo.js && node restore-wp-generated.js
